title: Marc Peter Deisenroth's Optimization Framework
description: A flowchart illustrating the key components and workflow of Deisenroth's approach to optimization, particularly focusing on probabilistic methods and Gaussian Processes.
relationships: Defines the optimization goal and constraints
Models the objective function and its uncertainty
Determines the next point to evaluate by balancing exploration and exploitation
Finds the candidate point that maximizes the acquisition function
Runs the expensive objective function at the chosen candidate point
Uses the new data point to update the probabilistic model for the next iteration
